tweet:
shipped 35 updates today.

the spectrum ranges from 'langchain integration' and 'transport document OCR' to 'd&d dungeon generator' and 'nail art creator'.

open source is a strange, wonderful place. come build weird stuff.
alt_tweet: merged 35 PRs. finally, a stack where you can parse transport documents and generate fashion thumbnails in the same breath. also added langchain support and a go client. getting busy in here.
image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot (Polly) in a cluttered workshop, sorting through eclectic items: a glowing wizard staff, a pixelated manicured hand model, and stacks of code documentation. The robot companion holds a Go language plushie. Lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, chunky sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic. Text in pixel font: 'CHAOS & CODE'. Stardew Valley vibes.
reasoning: Highlights the absurd range of open-source contributions (serious infra vs. niche fun) without marketing fluff. Dry list format respects the reader's time.
